commands.repair_reason: Maintainers need to decide whether the credential-cache contract and bundled delivery-path perf changes are acceptable before merge.; Cleared: No concrete new supply-chain issue was found, but the credential-store caching change remains an auth-provider merge risk rather than a standalone security finding. (sha=e3c909b9e1fe87e072b89c7a50c964cfab864e3a)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an mtime+size cache for device-auth store reads, promise-caches realpath resolution in session target discovery, runs tracked temp-dir cleanup deletions more broadly in parallel, and limits APNs registration reads with `runTasksWithConcurrency`.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this is a performance/refactor PR. The supplied proof demonstrates one local device-auth cache behavior, but not the gateway/APNs/session hot paths named in the PR.
commands.review_followup: Maintainers need to decide whether the credential-cache contract and bundled delivery-path perf changes are acceptable before merge.

target.title: perf: reduce latency across async I/O hot paths
target.author: ynachiket

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
